summary: 2026-06-10 13:12:59 PDT Static review found one spec/observability gap. I ran the requested diff/log/spec reads; `npm test` could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest tried to write `client/node_modules/.vite-temp/...` and hit EPERM.

findings.title: Auto-recovery cannot log the close half required by AC7
findings.claim: The spec's deploy-observed AC7 says Railway logs should show close-then-reopen (`closeRenderingContext` then `runRenderingContext`). In the actual diff, recovery calls `stopCameraOverlay()` before `startCameraOverlay()`, but `RealZoom.stopCameraOverlay()` still calls `this._sdk.closeRenderingContext()` directly, while only `startCameraOverlay()` is instrumented. As written, the live log can show `overlay-rearm:*` and `runRenderingContext`, but not the required `closeRenderingContext` entry/order.
findings.suggestion: Instrument `stopCameraOverlay()` with `_instrument('closeRenderingContext', () => this._sdk.closeRenderingContext())` so auto-recovery and manual hide both preserve behavior while emitting the close call needed to verify close-before-reopen.
